sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_sum_map (date Date, timeslot DateTime, statusMap Nested(status UInt16, requests UInt64), statusMapTuple Tuple(Array(Int32), Array(Int32))) ENGINE = Log;
SELECT timeslot, sumMap(NOT statusMap.status, statusMap.requests) FROM test_sum_map GROUP BY timeslot;
SELECT timeslot, sumMap(statusMapTuple) AS summed_tuple FROM (SELECT timeslot, NOT statusMap.requests AS requests FROM test_sum_map) GROUP BY timeslot;
SELECT timeslot, sumMap(statusMap.status, statusMap.requests) AS summed_requests FROM test_sum_map WHERE NOT (timeslot IS NULL) GROUP BY timeslot HAVING summed_requests.1 > 50;
CREATE TABLE complex_test (category String, values Array(Int32)) ENGINE = Log;
SELECT category, sumMap(NOT arrayJoin(values), arrayJoin(values)) AS sumValues FROM complex_test GROUP BY category;

WITH (SELECT sumMap(NOT statusMap.status, statusMap.requests) FROM test_sum_map) AS temp_sumMap SELECT timeslot, temp_sumMap.1 FROM test_sum_map WHERE timeslot > '2023-01-01 00:00:00' ORDER BY temp_sumMap.1 DESC;
CREATE TABLE edge_case_test (id UInt32, data String, value UInt64) ENGINE = Log;
SELECT data, sumMap(NOT id, IF(value IS NULL, 0, value)) AS conditional_sum FROM edge_case_test GROUP BY data;
